tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated creatinine, proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, and a slightly increased HbA1c, suggesting possible early diabetic nephropathy or impaired renal function with suboptimal glycemic control. Urine is cloudy, brown, and has low specific gravity, which may indicate renal concentrating defects. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend further nephrological and diabetic evaluation.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provider Organization: KfH-Nierenzentrum am Klinikum Freising
